mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM staff_account WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id FROM staff_account WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
SELECT username FROM user_account WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
SELECT id FROM staff_account WHERE username = #{username} LIMIT 1

SELECT sa.id, sa.username, sa.phone, sa.email FROM domain_member dm JOIN staff_account sa ON sa.id = dm.staff_account_id WHERE dm.business_domain_id = #{domainId} AND dm.staff_account_id = #{staffAccountId} AND dm.deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 1
